code:
import io
import string

type Light =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn advance(_ l: Light) -> Light
  match l
  when Red
    Light.Green
  when Green
    Light.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Light.Red
  end
end

fn name(_ l: Light) -> String
  match l
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_token = false
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      in_token = false
    else
      if not in_token
        count = count + 1
        in_token = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut state = Light.Red
mut j = 0
while j < count
  state = advance(state)
  j = j + 1
end

println(name(state))
